name: Shortbread Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Combine flour and sugar in a bowl.
3. Make a well in the center and add beaten egg yolk and softened butter.
4. Mix with hands until thoroughly combined.
5. Shape into a ball, wrap in plastic, and chill for at least 10 minutes.
6. Roll out to a thickness of about 1/4-inch (approximately an 11-inch circle).
7. Place in a 9-inch springform pan.
8. Prick the crust several times with a fork.
9. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until lightly browned.
10. Allow to cool completely.
11. Line the sides of the pan with remaining dough.
12. Press against the sides, ensuring full coverage.
13. Brush reserved egg white over bottom and sides.
14. Set aside until ready to use.
NOTE: For Italian Cheesecake, add 1 teaspoon grated lemon rind and 1 teaspoon Amaretto Liqueur when adding egg yolk and butter.
